nasb.text: Then David crossed over to the other side and stood on top of the mountain at a distance with a large area between them.

esv.text: Then David went over to the other side and stood far off on the top of the hill, with a great space between them.

cnv.text: 然後大衛過到另一邊去，遠遠地站在山頂上，兩者之間的距離很遠。

ccb.text: 大卫爬上营地对面的山坡，远远地站在山顶上，与他们相距很远。
